message:
test(tailer): migrate async tokio tests to runtime_compat::block_on pattern

Convert ~8 TailerSupervisor async tests from #[tokio::test] async fn
to #[test] fn using a local run_async_test(future) helper that builds
a runtime_compat::RuntimeBuilder::current_thread() runtime and calls
block_on. This is the standard pattern throughout the codebase for
runtime-agnostic tests that need to work under both tokio and
asupersync runtimes.

No logic changes — purely test framework migration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
